nodes.label: पढ़क्कू की सूझ
nodes.description: Chapter 11 - A humorous story about bookish knowledge vs practical wisdom

nodes.label: पात्र (Characters)
nodes.description: The characters in the story who bring the humor to life

nodes.label: पढ़क्कू (Bookworm)
nodes.description: Main character - a person who reads all the time but lacks practical common sense

nodes.label: अन्य पात्र (Other Characters)
nodes.description: Other people in the story who show practical wisdom and common sense

nodes.label: विषय (Theme)
nodes.description: The central theme contrasting bookish knowledge with practical wisdom

nodes.label: किताबी ज्ञान (Book Knowledge)
nodes.description: Knowledge gained from reading books - facts, theories, and information

nodes.label: व्यावहारिक ज्ञान (Practical Knowledge)
nodes.description: Wisdom gained from real-life experience and common sense

nodes.label: हास्य तत्व (Humour Elements)
nodes.description: The funny situations and comedy in the story

nodes.label: विडंबना (Irony)
nodes.description: The irony of a very learned person failing at simple everyday tasks

nodes.label: मज़ेदार घटनाएँ (Funny Events)
nodes.description: The comical situations where Padhakku's bookish solutions backfire

nodes.label: सीख (Moral)
nodes.description: The lesson: balance bookish knowledge with practical wisdom and real-world experience

nodes.label: भाषा कार्य (Language Skills)
nodes.description: Hindi language skills learned through this chapter

nodes.label: मुहावरे (Idioms)
nodes.description: Hindi idioms like 'किताबी कीड़ा' (bookworm) learned in this chapter

nodes.label: शब्द भंडार (Vocabulary)
nodes.description: New Hindi words: सूझ, व्यावहारिक, अनुभव, उपदेश, and more
